sys_ws_operation.name: Issue Token

sys_update_version.name: sys_ws_operation_69b5bc5560d647f880babb78edc559cc
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update>
  <sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
    <sys_id>69b5bc5560d647f880babb78edc559cc</sys_id>
    <sys_scope display_value="x_643482_my_cust_0">9df85c0f830d43107e20a270ceaad3a1</sys_scope>
    <web_service_version>llm-proxy-api-v1</web_service_version>
    <name>Issue Token</name>
    <operation_uri>/token</operation_uri>
    <http_method>GET</http_method>
    <active>true</active>
    <requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication>
    <requires_acl_authorization>false</requires_acl_authorization>
    <script><![CDATA[(function process(request, response) {
    if (!gs.isLoggedIn()) {
        response.setStatus(401);
        response.setContentType('application/json');
        response.getStreamOutput().print(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized' }));
        return;
    }

    var helper = new x_643482_my_cust_0.LLMProxyHelper();
    var token = helper.issueToken();

    // Ollama-specific properties take precedence; fall back to generic llm.chat.* values
    var endpoint = gs.getProperty('llm.ollama.endpoint', '') || gs.getProperty('llm.chat.endpoint', '');
    var model    = gs.getProperty('llm.ollama.model', '')    || gs.getProperty('llm.chat.model', '');

    response.setStatus(200);
    response.setContentType('application/json');
    response.getStreamOutput().print(JSON.stringify({
        token: token,
        expires_in: 60,
        endpoint: endpoint,
        model: model
    }));
})(request, response);
]]></script>
  </sys_ws_operation>
</record_update>
